summary: Iteration 31 Testing - Two new features: 1) Pod info on employee cards, 2) Search/filter in Assign Operators modal. All frontend features tested and verified. The pod info section on employee cards (EmployeesManagement.jsx lines 519-538) correctly shows pod name, role badge, and team lead name - but only renders when employees are assigned to pods (currently 0 employees in pods, so section doesn't show - this is correct conditional rendering). The Assign Operators modal (PodManagement.jsx lines 507-605) has all filters working: search input, status filter, service type filter, country filter.

issues: Mixed content warning: Notifications API called with HTTP instead of HTTPS - causes failed fetch (pre-existing issue from iteration 30)

employee_management_page.employee_cards_display: PASS - 3 employee cards displayed (Ben Carter Kyle, Cleaner T., Asco b)
employee_management_page.card_info_shown: PASS - Cards show name, role, email, phone, department, city, salary

pod_info_on_employee_cards.code_implementation: PASS - Pod info section exists at lines 519-538 with data-testid='pod-info-{emp.id}'
pod_info_on_employee_cards.conditional_rendering: PASS - Section only renders when getEmployeePod(emp) returns data
pod_info_on_employee_cards.pod_name_display: PASS - Code shows pod_name with Network icon in blue-50 bg
pod_info_on_employee_cards.role_badge: PASS - Code shows pod_role as Badge with blue styling
pod_info_on_employee_cards.team_lead_name: PASS - Code shows 'Lead: {team_lead_name}' with Crown icon if team_lead_name exists
pod_info_on_employee_cards.current_state: EXPECTED - 0 employees assigned to pods, so pod info sections not visible (correct behavior)

pod_management_page.page_loads: PASS - /admin/employees/pods loads with tabs and Pod Management section
pod_management_page.pods_displayed: PASS - 2 pods shown: Alpha Team, Strategic Team
pod_management_page.pod_selection: PASS - Clicking on pod shows details panel

assign_operators_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Assign Operators' button opens modal
assign_operators_modal.search_input: PASS - data-testid='operator-search-input' found, filters in real-time
assign_operators_modal.status_filter: PASS - data-testid='operator-status-filter' with options: All Status, Active, Pending, Suspended
assign_operators_modal.type_filter: PASS - data-testid='operator-type-filter' with All Types + dynamic list (travel, multi, laundry)
assign_operators_modal.country_filter: PASS - data-testid='operator-country-filter' with All Countries + dynamic list
assign_operators_modal.search_functionality: PASS - Typing filters operators (6 → 0 with 'transport' → 6 after clear)
assign_operators_modal.assign_button_count: PASS - Button shows count: 'Assign 0 Operators' → 'Assign 1 Operator' → 'Assign 2 Operators'

critical_code_review_comments: EmployeesManagement.jsx lines 519-538: Pod info section correctly implemented with conditional rendering
EmployeesManagement.jsx line 98-104: getEmployeePod helper matches by user_id or email
PodManagement.jsx lines 49-52: Filter states properly initialized (opSearch, opStatusFilter, opTypeFilter, opCountryFilter)
PodManagement.jsx lines 514-558: Filter section has all required data-testid attributes
PodManagement.jsx lines 563-596: Operator list filtered correctly by all 4 criteria
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested pod info on employee cards and Assign Operators modal filters. Employee card pod info only shows when employees are assigned to pods (currently 0, so sections don't render - correct behavior). Assign Operators modal has working search + 3 filter dropdowns (status, type, country). 6 operators available: Musango Bus Service (travel), Oryno Travel & Hospitality (multi), Prestige Pressing (laundry), Royal Events Cameroon, etc. All have 'active' status.
